findings.title: Information-Theoretic Limits of Safety Verification for Self-Improving Systems

findings.title: Unsafe2Safe: Controllable Image Anonymization for Downstream Utility

findings.title: MonitorBench: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Chain-of-Thought Monitorability in Large Language Models
